events.title: Ramadan Preparation Seminar
events.description: Get ready for the blessed month of Ramadan with practical tips on maximizing worship, maintaining health, and making this your best Ramadan yet.

events.title: Annual Quran Competition
events.description: Showcase your Quran memorization and recitation skills. Categories for all age groups with valuable prizes and certificates.

events.title: Summer Arabic Intensive
events.description: Accelerate your Arabic learning this summer with our 4-week immersive program. Suitable for all levels.

events.title: Family Fiqh Night
events.description: Interactive family workshop on Islamic etiquettes, family rights, and raising righteous children in the modern world.

events.title: Islamic Finance Webinar
events.description: Learn about halal investments, avoiding riba, and Islamic banking options. Open to international audience via Zoom.

events.title: International Seerah Conference
events.description: A two-day conference featuring international scholars discussing lessons from the Prophet's life for contemporary challenges.
